version_description: A No.28 hit in early 1985 for the band from their 16th album "Emergency" - https://youtu.be/1O8jsxj9Dqo.

versions.version_description: 80’s funk rock feel. Please follow the record to understand the pace of these changes as there are many passing chords and nuances. Many of these sections feel the same, but are distinct in how the melody is delivered. Interlude plays as intro. Outro repeats to fade with ad-libs.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Kool And The Gang - Misled (Kool And The Gang)
----------------------------------------------

If you enjoyed this, please add it to your favourites and/or
give a rating to show appreciation for the work that went into providing it for you

Video Here - https://youtu.be/1O8jsxj9Dqo

Alt video - https://youtu.be/UEME182Q3G4 (not the usual official band YT channel which I preferto use but
this one is just music and you can hear the full outro section)

Untypical guitar in this song as it's mostly just three distorted guitar power chords with plain strums
and none of their usual funk guitar included.

[tab]Chords Used
-----------
   [ch]Db5[/ch] [ch]Eb5[/ch]  [ch]B5[/ch]  [ch]Ab[/ch] [ch]Bbm[/ch]
e|--X---X---X---4---6--|[/tab]

G|--8---6---4---5---6--|
D|--8---6---4---6---8--|
A|--6---4---2---6---8--|[/tab]
[ch]E[/ch]|--X---X---X---4---6--|


[Intro]
[ch]Eb5[/ch]     [ch]Db5[/ch] [ch]Eb5[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]Eb5[/ch]                                                               [ch]Db5[/ch] [ch]Eb5[/ch]
Late at night, body's yearning, restless night, wanna be with you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb5[/ch]                                                                [ch]Db5[/ch] [ch]Eb5[/ch]

[tab][ch]B5[/ch]                       [ch]Db5[/ch]      [ch]Eb5[/ch]    [ch]Db5[/ch] [ch]Eb5[/ch]

[tab][ch]B5[/ch]                   [ch]Db5[/ch]              [ch]Eb5[/ch]
She's outgoing but I love her so, mis-led[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Eb5[/ch]                        [ch]Db5[/ch] [ch]B5[/ch]                       [ch]Db5[/ch]

Then I will    hey misled    be for real[/tab]
